meaning: n.被指定遗嘱执行者,执行者
examples: AM: You are his state executor.
The Executor interface accepts Runnable objects to execute.
Am: Do you have any assistants in your work as Camus' executor?
In 2005, Gary Coleman signed a will naming Gray as his executor and beneficiary.
The pair are so close that each has appointed the other as executor of his estate.
